title: ProDec Advance 5 Pack 6 inch Heavy Duty Double Thickness Hardened Steel Replacement Scraper Blades Compatible with ProDec Titan Scraper and Other 6 inch Scrapers for Maximum Power
features: Replacement blades for the ProDec 6" Titan Scraper
6” (150mm) double thickness blade for heavy duty scraping
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Titan blades - don't compromise when the going gets tough These are replacement blades for ProDec's 6" Titan heavy duty scraper (see below for details) although they are also compatible with many other 6" scrapers. The blade is made from double thickness steel designed to get through even the toughest tasks including: Removing wall and floor tile grout, adhesives/glues, silicones, sealants and bitumen Stripping wallpaper including anaglypta/woodchip papers Scraping wood, metal and plaster surfaces Lifting vinyl flooring General building work and much more Also available from ProDec: Titan - wield the ultimate scraping power Fully loaded for power and performance, Titan puts brute force scraping at your fingertips. When it comes to heavy duty scraping, nothing can compete with ProDec's Titan scraper - a juggernaut of a tool engineered to be heavy duty in every department. A 6" extra wide blade made from double thickness steel designed to withstand serious punishment is held in a cast steel head and mounted onto a 20" (50cm) chrome steel shaft that's a full 1" (25mm) in diameter with twin soft grip handles for double-handed use. This rugged construction enables you to apply massive power and get through even the toughest tasks. Changing blades is done quickly and easily in seconds via the quick release butterfly mechanism: simply flip up to release your blade and then back down to clamp the new one securely in place - no tools are required. 6" double thickness blade Designed to withstand serious punishment for heavy duty scraping, the Titan blade is double the thickness of standard scraper blades, so it won't let you down on the toughest jobs. 20" chrome shaft Titan is all about brute force and the chrome plated shaft is a full inch (25mm) in diameter, enabling you to deliver massive power to the blade. Secondary grip Unlike most scrapers, Titan has a secondary grip, enabling you to use both hands to generate huge pushing force and power through difficult jobs. Quick blade change The butterfly clamp has a simple flip up, flip down mechanism to securely clamp the blade in place for minimum downtime in the middle of a job.
